basic_details.job_title: RCB Project Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 notification at rcb.res.in. A total of 01 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancy has been announced under the RCB Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing an M.Sc. in Life Sciences or related natural science disciplines with at least 60% marks along with NET/ GATE or an equivalent national-level examination are eligible to apply online. Interested candidates can submit their applications on or before 05 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Life Sciences or related natural science disciplines with at least 60% marks and NET/GATE or equivalent national level examination
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Life Sciences or related natural science disciplines from recognized Universities or equivalent, with at least 60% marks. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. As per DST OM No. DST/PCPM/Z/2022, dated 26th June 2023.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RCB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RCB Project JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RCB Project JRF Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
RCB Project JRF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Life Sciences or related natural science disciplines from recognized Universities or equivalent, with at least 60% marks. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. As per DST OM No. DST/PCPM/Z/2022, dated 26th June 2023.

RCB Project JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
RCB Project JRF Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RCB Project JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project JRF position at RCB is August 5, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline to be considered.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Life Sciences or related natural science disciplines with at least 60% marks. Additionally, they must have qualified in NET/GATE or an equivalent national-level examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project JRF position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project JRF position as per the official notification released by the Regional Centre for Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project JRF position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for the Project JRF position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limit for the Project JRF position. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project JRF position at the Regional Centre for Biotechnology is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Project JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of RCB or via the direct application link provided in the "Important Links" section on or before August 5, 2026.
